name: Web3 - Phantom Fund
description:
Deploy instance with 10 Finney
We've deployed a highly-secure decentralized crowdfunding platform. Users can create campaigns, raise ETH, withdraw their raised funds, or completely cancel their campaign to allow users to refund their remaining contributions.
A high-profile VC just backed a project called "Campaign 999". Show them why relying solely on standard state arrays and structs can lead to catastrophic logic flaws.
Objective: Drain the PhantomFund contract balance to 0.
